creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text: I've committed gpgme 1.7.0 and added the c++ bindings as security/gpgme-cpp and the Qt5 interface as security/gpgme-qt5.  There is still an installation conflict with lib/libqgpgme.so. I'll leave this PR open for now until we can resolve this or if there is further work that needs done.
